info.title: AzSolutionManager
info.description: Az Solution Manager streamlines management of solution resources in your Azure Subscription.

commands.name: deployment
commands.description: Helper function(s) to ARM/Bicep deployments in managed solutions.

options.name: --filepath
options.description: File path to deployment parameters file

options.name: --deployment-name
options.description:
Deployment name. If this is not provided, a timestamp
based name will be provided.

options.name: --logging
options.description: Logging levels: Trace, Debug, Info, Warn, Error
